title: La Ropa de Sofía
author: Luna 📚 (AI Book Generator)
learningObjectives: Learn names of common clothing items in Spanish
Understand the sequence of getting dressed
Practice making choices about what to wear

seo.metaTitle: La Ropa de Sofía - Libro Interactivo de Español para Niños
seo.metaDescription: Libro interactivo gratis en español para niños de 2-5 años. Aprende los nombres de la ropa con Sofía mientras se viste para el día. Incluye audio y vocabulario.
seo.targetAudience: Parents of preschoolers (ages 2-5) seeking Spanish language learning resources

parentTips: Use this book during your child's morning routine to reinforce vocabulary
Ask your child to name their own clothes in Spanish as they get dressed
Encourage independence by letting them dress themselves like Sofia
Make it fun by singing about each piece of clothing

ctaStrategy.primary: Schedule a tour at Beibei Amigos

funFacts: Children typically learn to dress themselves between ages 3-5
Learning clothing vocabulary helps build independence
Spanish uses gendered articles (el/la) which helps children learn grammar patterns
Many Spanish clothing words are similar to English (suéter/sweater)
